text:
(In reply to Bjoern A. Zeeb from comment #18)

I try to recreate the crash and a dump, but not able atm, i remember i made a big scp transfer to the machine (bigger then ram) over ethernet but with active wireless and no Thunderbird dir's (first start) and the mentioned sysctl's.

I then deleted the Thunderbird dir's (because of crash) and started Thunderbird again and had an immediate crash again.
